title: Didymoplexiella forcipata
taxonomy: Didymoplexiella forcipata is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that is native to Borneo. This species is classified as a member of the tribe Coelogyneae. Within the tribe, it is a member of the subtribe Coelogyneinae. The classification of Didymoplexiella forcipata is still being studied and refined by botanists.
